summary_one_line: Winner must drive a well-formed HTTP response carrying a parseable Content-Length so k->size != -1 reaches Curl_pgrsSetDownloadSize with size >= 0.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Input bytes that constitute a valid HTTP request/response framing (e.g. an HTTP/ method line and Content-Length-bearing headers) so that the response-size variable k->size parses to a non-negative value (!= -1), letting Curl_http_size call Curl_pgrsSetDownloadSize(data, k->size) with size >= 0 and take the true branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winning seed contains literal HTTP structure ('HTTP/' at offset 0x24, a URL '3://127./.0.1:9001', and a 'Content' header start at 0x30), so the request elicits a response whose size field parses non-negative; the caller block (lines 3857-3865, all [W]) shows the k->size != -1 path and the Curl_pgrsSetDownloadSize call only fire under the winner.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The loser seeds are degenerate repeated '%' fill ('%%%%%%%%%%%%') and '...' runs with no HTTP/ token or header framing, so the size variable never parses to a non-negative value; the loser only ever takes the false branch (T=0 F=10 at line 354).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP feedback; I2S substitution copies the intercepted comparison operand (the HTTP magic / size literal) directly into the input at the compared offset, synthesizing the structural HTTP framing that value_profile's havoc-plus-distance-bucket feedback could not assemble byte-by-byte.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of size >= 0 in Curl_pgrsSetDownloadSize, globally blocked on the true branch.
value_profile_cmplog is the winner and value_profile the loser, separated by the I2S technique delta.
The caller passes k->size to Curl_pgrsSetDownloadSize only when k->size != -1, and that path is exercised solely by the winner.
The winning seed contains an HTTP/ token and Content header framing.
The loser seeds are degenerate percent-fill bytes with no HTTP framing.
The loser fuzzer takes the false branch in all trials while the winner takes the true side.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace; its mutators are havoc plus token only.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the havoc and token stack.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 353 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 2 --seed c2dff1c31a6fa435`; the ancestor chain (8 levels) contains two I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 6 and depth 7, the unwrapped-I2SRandReplace floor signal under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating size >= 0 behind a parseable HTTP/Content-Length literal where value_profile resolves the true branch at the same rate as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage).

weakest_evidence_point: The causal link from the winner's HTTP/Content framing bytes to a non-negative k->size is inferred from the caller source path, not observed directly as a runtime size value.
